final_prompt.prompt:
Create a commercial interior photograph of a high-end medical aesthetic clinic's skin treatment room.

Style/medium: Commercial architectural photography, clean editorial style with subtle depth and realistic material rendering
Composition: Symmetrical wide-angle shot centered on the treatment bed, eye-level perspective, balanced spatial order
Subject: Ergonomic electric aesthetic bed with leather upholstery, LED phototherapy device, RF beauty equipment, large digital skin analysis display on wall
Scene/backdrop: Minimalist treatment room with white and natural wood palette, floor-to-ceiling skincare display cabinet with premium products, frosted glass sliding door revealing soft corridor light
Lighting/mood: Soft natural medical-grade clean light with intelligent dimming system, gentle shadow transitions, professional and serene atmosphere
Color palette: White as dominant base, warm natural wood as secondary, subtle green from plants as accent, moderate saturation
Materials/textures: Genuine leather bed surface with visible grain, cool metallic sheen on instruments, warm tactile wood grain, frosted glass diffusion
Avoid: harsh shadows, oversaturated colors, cluttered composition, generic stock photo aesthetic, 8K stuffer terms
